title: Street Fighter 6/Version/2.0111 - SuperCombo Wiki
content_text: Version 2.0111 Game Version 2.0111 date December 16, 2025 Summary Bug fixes and minor adjustments, primarily for Elena, Mai, and Sagat. Links Patch Notes Universal Changes Drive Gauge Appearance: if any amount of Drive gauge remains over the threshold (0/10000/20000/30000/40000/50000), the entire block of gauge will change color to make it easier to distinguish from an empty block Command Throw SA3/CA (Lily, Manon, Zangief): removed unnecessary block idle hitbox that allowed opponents to avoid the throw when landing from a jump 2LK (all characters): extended foot hurtbox that appears before active frames is now invincible to cross-up attacks Character Changes C. Viper j.LP / j.HP no longer Force Stand when hitting a crouching opponent Lv.3 Focus Force (214[K]/[KK]) now deals +4 additional hitstun on Punish Counter like the uncharged versions Now KD +77, and crumple is +29 before opponent falls to the ground Chun-Li Serenity Stream > LP / LK / MK on Perfect Parry: removed some recovery frames immediately before her forced Stance Exit This reduces the total recovery on PP by 2f (LP) / 5f (LK) / 6f (MK) and affects Perfect Parry disadvantage by the same amount This was done because despite being in a Punish Counter state, Chun-Li could block in the middle of her recovery animation on these frames. Dhalsim CA fixed a bug where the Drive Damage and Chip Damage were set to SA3 levels when canceled into Drive Damage on Block: 7500 → 10000 Chip Damage: 1000 → 1250 Elena Leopard Snap (236P~6LK) Super Art gain 600 → 1000 Boosted Leopard Snap (236P~6P~6LK or 236PP~6LK) pushback on block reduced, and normalized the distance on block when used midscreen or in the corner 1st hit has less blowback on airborne opponents to make the 2nd hit more consistent in juggles Moon Glider (214P~6P) 2nd attack hitbox expanded forward OD Moon Glider (214PP) pushback on hit reduced, increased forward movement after the backwards sway More effective as a shimmy tool, leading to more consistent Punish Counter follow-ups SA1 startup reduced 9f → 7f; total animation 96f → 94f; can now build Super gauge after landing this in a combo All airborne and air invuln frames shifted 2f earlier to compensate Mai Forward Throw leaves Mai closer to a cornered opponent (can no longer walk back to shimmy after a dash) 5HP Drive Damage reduced 5000 → 4000 Kachousen (236P) - Charged / Charged OD / Flame versions build more Drive gauge for the defender when Parried and/or Perfect Parried Kachousen (Fan) Drive Gain (on Parry) Drive Gain (on Perfect Parry) 236[P] 2500x2 → 5000,2500 2500x2 → 5000x2 236[PP] 1400x2 → 2500x2 236[PP]~6P -- 1st/2nd: 1200x2 → 2500x2 3rd/4th: 1150x2 → 5000x2 F.236P 2500x2 → 3000x2 F.236[P] 1250x2,2500 → 2500x3 1250x2,2500 → 2500x2,5000 F.236[PP] 1st/2nd: 1200x2 → 2500x2 1st/2nd: 1200x2 → 2500x2 3rd/4th: 750x2 → 2500x2 F.236[PP]~6P -- 1st/2nd: 1050x2 → 2500x2 3rd/4th: 750x2 → 2500x2 Sagat 2LK pushback reduced on hit/block for more consistent hitconfirms 2MK Hit Advantage +4 → +5; hitstun 25 → 26 Gives a natural link to 5LP, a CH link to 5LK/2MP, and a DR/PC link to itself at farther ranges Tiger Monolith (4HP) 1st hit active frames increased 2 → 3 (more consistent juggle tool, does not affect anti-air frames) Charged HP Tiger Uppercut (623[HP]) now gives the stronger cinematic hit up to the 3rd active frame instead of only frames 1-2; collision box expanded upward on active frames 1-2 This slightly increases the max range of the strong hit and makes it more consistent in some high juggles HK Tiger Knee (236HK) expanded combo-only hitbox of 2nd hit upward to prevent it from whiffing when 1st hit connects (does not apply to "sweet spot" connect) LK/MK Tiger Nexus (214LK/214MK) increased pushback on hit; increased forward movement during startup; increased horizontal blowback on airborne hit Total range 1.56 → 1.66 (214LK) / 1.86 → 1.96 (214MK) More consistent in grounded confirms (e.g. 3 lights > 214LK), while keeping juggle scenarios intact Mighty Tiger (214K/KK~6LK) increased pushback on hit; increased horizontal blowback on airborne hit If 214LK~6LK is used from a 2-light confirm, opponent is in range for Throw or 2LK~5LP mixup; does not work from new 3-light confirm Greedy Tiger (214K/KK~6MK) Drive Damage increased 6000 → 8000 Nova Tiger (214K/KK~6HK) reduced pushback on block Can now throw opponents who back walk, but can no longer shimmy unless opponent delays throw tech at least 3f

lists.text: Drive Gauge Appearance: if any amount of Drive gauge remains over the threshold (0/10000/20000/30000/40000/50000), the entire block of gauge will change color to make it easier to distinguish from an empty block Command Throw SA3/CA (Lily, Manon, Zangief): removed unnecessary block idle hitbox that allowed opponents to avoid the throw when landing from a jump 2LK (all characters): extended foot hurtbox that appears before active frames is now invincible to cross-up attacks

lists.text: Serenity Stream > LP / LK / MK on Perfect Parry: removed some recovery frames immediately before her forced Stance Exit This reduces the total recovery on PP by 2f (LP) / 5f (LK) / 6f (MK) and affects Perfect Parry disadvantage by the same amount This was done because despite being in a Punish Counter state, Chun-Li could block in the middle of her recovery animation on these frames.

items.text: Serenity Stream > LP / LK / MK on Perfect Parry: removed some recovery frames immediately before her forced Stance Exit This reduces the total recovery on PP by 2f (LP) / 5f (LK) / 6f (MK) and affects Perfect Parry disadvantage by the same amount This was done because despite being in a Punish Counter state, Chun-Li could block in the middle of her recovery animation on these frames.
items.html:
Serenity Stream > LP / LK / MK on Perfect Parry: removed some recovery frames immediately before her forced Stance Exit
  • This reduces the total recovery on PP by 2f (LP) / 5f (LK) / 6f (MK) and affects Perfect Parry disadvantage by the same amount
  • This was done because despite being in a Punish Counter state, Chun-Li could block in the middle of her recovery animation on these frames.

lists.text: Leopard Snap (236P~6LK) Super Art gain 600 → 1000 Boosted Leopard Snap (236P~6P~6LK or 236PP~6LK) pushback on block reduced, and normalized the distance on block when used midscreen or in the corner 1st hit has less blowback on airborne opponents to make the 2nd hit more consistent in juggles Moon Glider (214P~6P) 2nd attack hitbox expanded forward OD Moon Glider (214PP) pushback on hit reduced, increased forward movement after the backwards sway More effective as a shimmy tool, leading to more consistent Punish Counter follow-ups SA1 startup reduced 9f → 7f; total animation 96f → 94f; can now build Super gauge after landing this in a combo All airborne and air invuln frames shifted 2f earlier to compensate

items.html:
Boosted Leopard Snap (236P~6P~6LK or 236PP~6LK) pushback on block reduced, and normalized the distance on block when used midscreen or in the corner
  • 1st hit has less blowback on airborne opponents to make the 2nd hit more consistent in juggles

lists.text: 2LK pushback reduced on hit/block for more consistent hitconfirms 2MK Hit Advantage +4 → +5; hitstun 25 → 26 Gives a natural link to 5LP, a CH link to 5LK/2MP, and a DR/PC link to itself at farther ranges Tiger Monolith (4HP) 1st hit active frames increased 2 → 3 (more consistent juggle tool, does not affect anti-air frames) Charged HP Tiger Uppercut (623[HP]) now gives the stronger cinematic hit up to the 3rd active frame instead of only frames 1-2; collision box expanded upward on active frames 1-2 This slightly increases the max range of the strong hit and makes it more consistent in some high juggles HK Tiger Knee (236HK) expanded combo-only hitbox of 2nd hit upward to prevent it from whiffing when 1st hit connects (does not apply to "sweet spot" connect) LK/MK Tiger Nexus (214LK/214MK) increased pushback on hit; increased forward movement during startup; increased horizontal blowback on airborne hit Total range 1.56 → 1.66 (214LK) / 1.86 → 1.96 (214MK) More consistent in grounded confirms (e.g. 3 lights > 214LK), while keeping juggle scenarios intact Mighty Tiger (214K/KK~6LK) increased pushback on hit; increased horizontal blowback on airborne hit If 214LK~6LK is used from a 2-light confirm, opponent is in range for Throw or 2LK~5LP mixup; does not work from new 3-light confirm Greedy Tiger (214K/KK~6MK) Drive Damage increased 6000 → 8000 Nova Tiger (214K/KK~6HK) reduced pushback on block Can now throw opponents who back walk, but can no longer shimmy unless opponent delays throw tech at least 3f

items.text: 2LK pushback reduced on hit/block for more consistent hitconfirms
items.html: 2LK pushback reduced on hit/block for more consistent hitconfirms

items.text: 2MK Hit Advantage +4 → +5; hitstun 25 → 26 Gives a natural link to 5LP, a CH link to 5LK/2MP, and a DR/PC link to itself at farther ranges
items.html:
2MK Hit Advantage +4 → +5; hitstun 25 → 26
  • Gives a natural link to 5LP, a CH link to 5LK/2MP, and a DR/PC link to itself at farther ranges

items.text: Tiger Monolith (4HP) 1st hit active frames increased 2 → 3 (more consistent juggle tool, does not affect anti-air frames)
items.html: Tiger Monolith (4HP) 1st hit active frames increased 2 → 3 (more consistent juggle tool, does not affect anti-air frames)

items.text: Charged HP Tiger Uppercut (623[HP]) now gives the stronger cinematic hit up to the 3rd active frame instead of only frames 1-2; collision box expanded upward on active frames 1-2 This slightly increases the max range of the strong hit and makes it more consistent in some high juggles
items.html:
Charged HP Tiger Uppercut (623[HP]) now gives the stronger cinematic hit up to the 3rd active frame instead of only frames 1-2; collision box expanded upward on active frames 1-2
  • This slightly increases the max range of the strong hit and makes it more consistent in some high juggles

items.text: HK Tiger Knee (236HK) expanded combo-only hitbox of 2nd hit upward to prevent it from whiffing when 1st hit connects (does not apply to "sweet spot" connect)
items.html: HK Tiger Knee (236HK) expanded combo-only hitbox of 2nd hit upward to prevent it from whiffing when 1st hit connects (does not apply to "sweet spot" connect)

items.text: LK/MK Tiger Nexus (214LK/214MK) increased pushback on hit; increased forward movement during startup; increased horizontal blowback on airborne hit Total range 1.56 → 1.66 (214LK) / 1.86 → 1.96 (214MK) More consistent in grounded confirms (e.g. 3 lights > 214LK), while keeping juggle scenarios intact
items.html:
LK/MK Tiger Nexus (214LK/214MK) increased pushback on hit; increased forward movement during startup; increased horizontal blowback on airborne hit
  • Total range 1.56 → 1.66 (214LK) / 1.86 → 1.96 (214MK)
  • More consistent in grounded confirms (e.g. 3 lights > 214LK), while keeping juggle scenarios intact

items.text: Mighty Tiger (214K/KK~6LK) increased pushback on hit; increased horizontal blowback on airborne hit If 214LK~6LK is used from a 2-light confirm, opponent is in range for Throw or 2LK~5LP mixup; does not work from new 3-light confirm
items.html:
Mighty Tiger (214K/KK~6LK) increased pushback on hit; increased horizontal blowback on airborne hit
  • If 214LK~6LK is used from a 2-light confirm, opponent is in range for Throw or 2LK~5LP mixup; does not work from new 3-light confirm

items.text: Greedy Tiger (214K/KK~6MK) Drive Damage increased 6000 → 8000
items.html: Greedy Tiger (214K/KK~6MK) Drive Damage increased 6000 → 8000

items.text: Nova Tiger (214K/KK~6HK) reduced pushback on block Can now throw opponents who back walk, but can no longer shimmy unless opponent delays throw tech at least 3f
items.html:
Nova Tiger (214K/KK~6HK) reduced pushback on block
  • Can now throw opponents who back walk, but can no longer shimmy unless opponent delays throw tech at least 3f
